title: refresh_tools must respect capabilities.tools gate before issuing tools/list
description: CC fetchToolsForClient (client.ts:1748-1751) returns [] without making a wire call if capabilities.tools is falsy. OC McpServer::refresh_tools (src/mcp.rs:439-440) calls tools/list unconditionally, ignoring whether the server declared the tools capability. This results in a spurious RPC call and will produce a JSON-RPC error on servers that do not support the tools capability. Required: add a capabilities.tools guard at the start of refresh_tools, returning Ok(()) immediately if tools capability is absent.
